recent_changes.description: Fix AppBar title spacing in ScenarioDashboardPage

errors_encountered.error: RenderFlex overflowed by X pixels on the bottom
errors_encountered.solution: Wrap Column with SingleChildScrollView or use isScrollControlled: true with ConstrainedBox for BottomSheets

decisions_made.decision: GoalsListPage is the new root route (/home)
decisions_made.reason: Better overview for users with multiple goals
Allows quick switching between goals while in the detailed view without going back to the main list
